contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/sub_agency/count.md
contract.description: Counts distinct sub-agencies and offices for a specified toptier agency in a single fiscal year, using either the awarding or funding perspective.

toptier_code.description: CGAC or FREC toptier code whose sub-agencies and offices are aggregated.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; 3-4 digit numeric string with significant leading zeros. Unknown numeric codes return JSON 404, while non-numeric or mis-padded segments (e.g., '12A', '12') return an HTML 404 response.

fiscal_year.description: Appropriations fiscal year to aggregate; defaults to the current published fiscal year when omitted or empty.
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; integer between 2008 and 2026 inclusive (bounds observed via 422 errors). Empty values (e.g., '?fiscal_year=') default to the current year. Non-integers or whitespace-only inputs raise 400, and values outside the range raise 422.

agency_type.description: Selects awarding or funding agency view for the aggregation.
agency_type.constraints: Optional; case-sensitive enum ['awarding', 'funding']. Defaults to awarding when omitted or provided as an empty string. Uppercase or whitespace-only values raise 400.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year actually used for aggregation (defaults to the current year when unspecified).

sub_agency_count.description: Distinct count of sub-agencies for the selected fiscal year and agency view; can be zero.

office_count.description: Distinct count of offices for the selected fiscal year and agency view; can be zero.

messages.description: Array of warning or informational strings. Fiscal years prior to 2017 include a DATA Act coverage warning; other years typically return an empty array.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Requests without the trailing slash receive a 301 redirect to the slash-terminated path.
Empty query parameters (e.g., '?fiscal_year=' or '?agency_type=') fall back to defaults, but whitespace-only values raise 400.
Messages include a DATA Act coverage warning for fiscal years before 2017.
Non-numeric or mis-padded 'toptier_code' segments return an HTML 404 page instead of JSON.
agency_type is case-sensitive; uppercase variants like 'FUNDING' are rejected with HTTP 400.
risks: Maximum supported fiscal_year tracks USAspending data releases (2026 observed) and will change as new fiscal years are published.
Malformed toptier_code segments return HTML rather than JSON errors, which can break clients expecting JSON responses.
Valid responses may contain zero counts; integrations must treat zeros as legitimate data.
Case-sensitive agency_type validation may reject user-supplied values that are capitalized or localized.
gaps: Full catalog of valid toptier codes (CGAC and FREC) was not exhaustively enumerated.
Messages content beyond the observed DATA Act warning remains unverified.

probes.notes: Default request returns current fiscal year counts with messages empty.
Explicit fiscal_year within range returns data without warnings.
Funding view returns different counts, confirming agency_type switch.
Invalid agency_type raises 400 with allowed values.
Upper bound of supported fiscal years is currently 2026.
Lower bound validation rejects fiscal years before 2008.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"012","fiscal_year":2008,"sub_agency_count":20,"office_count":398,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: Earliest supported year returns counts plus DATA Act warning message.
Empty fiscal_year query falls back to the default current year.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. ' ' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: Whitespace-only fiscal_year values raise a 400 instead of defaulting.
Empty agency_type query defaults back to awarding view.
Uppercase agency_type is rejected, confirming case sensitivity.
Some agencies legitimately return zero sub-agency and office counts.

response.bodyExcerpt:
Not Found

The requested resource was not found on this server.

probes.notes: Missing leading zero in toptier_code results in HTML 404 rather than JSON.
Four-digit FREC-style toptier codes are accepted.

mismatches: Docs describe the 'toptier_code' parameter as a number, but the live API requires a zero-padded numeric string and rejects numeric parsing that drops leading zeros.
Documentation lists a numeric request body schema, yet the live API ignores bodies and relies entirely on path and query parameters.
Docs imply JSON error payloads for invalid paths, but malformed 'toptier_code' segments return an HTML 404 page.
gaps: Full catalog of valid toptier codes (CGAC and FREC) was not exhaustively enumerated.
Messages content beyond the observed DATA Act warning remains unverified.
risks: Maximum supported fiscal_year tracks USAspending data releases (2026 observed) and will change as new fiscal years are published.
Malformed toptier_code segments return HTML rather than JSON errors, which can break clients expecting JSON responses.
Valid responses may contain zero counts; integrations must treat zeros as legitimate data.
Case-sensitive agency_type validation may reject user-supplied values that are capitalized or localized.
